name: Limestone County

actions.title: Google data center campus expansion in Limestone County
actions.summary: Google continued expanding its multi-billion-dollar data center campus near Bridgeport in Limestone County, with additional investment phases announced. The project has received significant state and local tax incentive support.

contextBlurb: Limestone County hosts Google's massive data center campus near Bridgefort, which has seen successive billion-dollar investment phases. The facility is one of Alabama's largest data center developments and has drawn attention for its energy and water demands alongside its economic benefits.

name: Madison County

actions.title: (City of Huntsville) Meta data center development approval
actions.summary: Meta's large-scale data center project in Huntsville continued advancing with local support and infrastructure coordination, part of the broader growth of north Alabama as a data center hub.

contextBlurb: Madison County and the City of Huntsville have attracted significant data center investment, including Meta's campus. The area's proximity to TVA power and existing tech infrastructure make it a growing data center corridor in the Southeast.
